title: hagenia anthelmintica
intro: Hagenia anthelmintica, also known as the African coffee tree, is a flowering plant native to the high-altitude forests of Ethiopia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hagenia anthelmintica include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are typically used to make tea, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
